name: portafolio-antonella-rivas
description: Landing page profesional para Antonella Rivas - Desarrolladora Frontend Junior

scripts.build: npm run minify-css && npm run minify-js
scripts.test:lint: echo "🔍 Verificando errores de linting..." && html-validate index.html && echo "✅ Linting OK"
scripts.test:js: echo "🔍 Verificando JavaScript..." && node -c js/main.js && node -c js/form-validation.js && node -c js/animations.js && node -c js/translations.js && echo "✅ JavaScript OK"
scripts.test:performance: echo "🔍 Verificando rendimiento..." && npm run lighthouse
scripts.test:all: npm run test:lint && npm run test:js && npm run test:links
scripts.watch:simple: npm run test:all && echo "👀 Modo watch activado - Ejecutando tests cada 5 segundos..." && setInterval(() => { npm run test:all }, 5000)
scripts.deploy:check: npm run test:all && npm run build && echo "✅ Listo para deploy"

author: Antonella Rivas
